reviews.review_description: It is a good game but for some reason my controls are reversed.

Im a terrible driver and most new players are so sometimes we flip
please add a flip button so it is easy to not get stuck

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for the honest and fun review. We completely understand—driving in VR can be tricky, and you are definitely not the only one flipping the taxi! Adding a 'flip' or 'reset car' button is a fantastic idea to prevent getting stuck. Our team is working on implementing this feature in an upcoming update so you can get right back on the road. Drive safe

reviews.review_title: Fun little game with lots of potential
reviews.review_description:
For the price, this is a fun little game. It takes a little while to get used to the feeling steering and using the turning signal, but once you get the hang of it, it's pretty fun! However, I have a few criticisms: 

- the side menu with the fan, window etc. controls is very finicky, often you accidentally select something you don't want. The touching with the finger way of doing is imprecise, I would suggest improving that, maybe with a laser pointing system

- you're supposed to follow trafic rules, which means stopping at trafic lights, but often the fares don't have enough time for that, so you end up failing a fare because you sat waiting for the light to turn green

-the pedestrian pathfinding could use some improvement, quite often you see pedestrians stuck walking in place

Other than that, it's a very entertaining game, there is a lot of potential here, such as adding career mode, purchasable vehicles and vehicle upgrades and such. I look forward to seeing where the development for this game goes

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the detailed feedback — we truly appreciate it!
We’re really glad to hear you found the game fun and see the potential in it.

Your points are absolutely valid, and we are already working on improvements in these areas:

• Side control panel (fan, windows, etc.)
We agree that the touch interaction can feel imprecise. We’re currently testing a more reliable interaction system, including options like a small laser pointer to avoid accidental selections.

• Traffic lights vs. fare timer
This is a great observation. We’re rebalancing the timer system so players won’t fail fares simply for obeying traffic rules. The next update should make this much fairer and more consistent.

• Pedestrian pathfinding
Yes — we’ve noticed this too. Pathfinding logic is being optimized, and we expect much smoother pedestrian behavior in an upcoming patch.

We also love your suggestions regarding career mode, unlockable vehicles, upgrades, and progression systems — they align perfectly with our long-term plans for the game. We want to expand this into a deeper and more rewarding taxi experience.

Thank you again for playing and for taking the time to write such a thoughtful review.
We’re excited to show you what’s coming next!

reviews.review_description: Steering is awesome it's with my hands turning instead of joystick. A little bit tricky. Getting customers is almost impossible though.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for the feedback. We are glad you enjoyed the hand-steering mechanics! Regarding the difficulty of getting customers, we hear you loud and clear. Our team is currently reviewing the game balance, and we plan to adjust the difficulty in the next update to make the experience smoother. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_title: At first fun but it glitches
reviews.review_description: I think there is a bug in the game because once I played it one time then left now I can't play because the steering wheel is gone

developer_response.body:
Thanks again for reporting this issue.
We’d like to let you know that this problem has been fixed in the latest update, improving stability after exiting a session.

Your feedback helped us identify and resolve the issue — thank you for helping us improve the game!

reviews.review_title: Probably the most fun car game
reviews.review_description: But could you add some more cars?

developer_response.body:
Yes — adding more cars is already in our plans, and we’re actively working on expanding the vehicle lineup in upcoming updates.

We appreciate your feedback and support!

reviews.review_description: Can't even put 2 hands on the wheel without it being stiff or glitching and making me go a different way when I turn sort it out make the wheel more smooth too use other then that decent game

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your feedback!
We’re sorry about the issues you experienced with the two-hand steering — we know how important smooth and responsive controls are for a driving game.

We’re currently working on an update that will:

Improve two-hand steering stability

Make the wheel movement smoother and more accurate

Reduce any stiffness or unexpected direction changes

Optimize hand-tracking and controller input

Your comment helps us prioritize these improvements, so thank you for pointing it out.
We hope you’ll check out the upcoming update — it should make the driving experience much better.

Thanks again for playing and for supporting our game!

reviews.review_description: Story mode ,make passengers talk, fix car steering  ,make a radio and maybe multiplayer and car customisation

developer_response.body:
Wow, that is an amazing wishlist! Thank you for the great suggestions.

Steering: Improving the steering logic is our top priority right now, and we are working on a fix.

Radio & Customization: We love these ideas! We are looking into adding features like a radio and customization in future updates.

Story & Multiplayer: These are huge features, but we will definitely keep them in mind as the game grows.

Thanks for helping us shape the game!

reviews.review_description: this game allows you to drive around freely, will you can also pick up people and bring them to their locations for drop off

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment. I We appreciate your interest and hope you continue to enjoy the game .

reviews.review_description:
I’ll leave 5 stars now because I’ll likely forget to change it once they implement changes. The game has great potential. The other cars brake lights work, traffic works great, they indicate as well. But my issues are
1. The Quest 3 can handle much more graphics. Apply some 4x anti-aliasing and add more cars. Make bumping into people more interesting.
2. The car turbulence is just insane. I’ve never driven a car that’s so bumpy on a smooth road. Please give an option to remove the bumpiness
3. It would be great if you could turn the steering a greater degree. I know it might be a struggle with rotation constraints or maybe you tested it and it wasn’t feasible
4. Make the index finger click on menu buttons. The knuckles press buttons by accident
5.  The UI when you complete a ride is very big and clunky. It can be smaller

That’s all. Great game overall honestly

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed feedback and 5-star rating! We’re glad you enjoy the gameplay and traffic system. Your suggestions regarding graphics, car physics, steering, menu interactions, and UI are very valuable, and we’ll consider them in future updates. We appreciate your support and input!

reviews.review_description: Pass on this.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are continuously working to improve the game, and we truly value input from our players. If there are specific areas you feel need improvement, we'd love to hear them so we can take them into consideration. Development is ongoing, and we encourage you to stay tuned for future updates.

reviews.review_description:
Its games like this that shows meta made a HUGE mistake letting anything just get thrown together and released on the store!!

Theres quality checks for a reason!

Initial load into the car i thought "ah this looks quite cool"

Until i acelerated 1mph and the world stutters to the point of most likely giving people seizures.

Meta should be ashamed of themselves for opening the flood gates to anything anyone can turn into a "Game".

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that our game didn’t meet your expectations. We are continuously working on improving all aspects of the game, and we highly value the experiences of our players. We will continue to work on addressing any issues with the game and delivering a better experience. All feedback is important to us, and we will take your comments into consideration. Thank you again for your interest.

reviews.review_description: Overall for the price this game is amazing , working mirrors , blinkers, car horn , missions with people who ask you to do specific things like lower the window. However , my only qualm is the max speed , if you guys could increase it , immediate 5 star review. Otherwise keep going with the development of this game , really excited to see what you guys have in store for the future. I would love to eventually see a career mode with better unlock-able cars you can purchase with your money as well as maybe some type of story? I know your development studio is probably small so I am okay with waiting for good content over rushed bad content , thank you for the great game already.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your nice review and amazing ideas :) We will definitely continue to improve our game

reviews.review_description:
Tracking is awful in this, it's hard to know when you holding onto the steering wheel, if it doesn't just snap into a random location, and the car seems way to small. 
Great tech demo with the working mirrors and ai mechanics though

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that our game didn’t meet your expectations. We are continuously working on improving all aspects of the game, and we highly value the experiences of our players. We will continue to work on addressing any issues with the game and delivering a better experience. All feedback is important to us, and we will take your comments into consideration. Thank you again for your interest.

reviews.review_description: Funniest game I've ever played

developer_response.body: Thank you so much :)

reviews.review_description: My followers loved this game and I had a lot of fun. Very good!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled that you and your followers enjoyed the game. Your support means the world to us! Additionally, we appreciate your valuable feedback.

reviews.review_description: I really like this game so far I like how the car has blinkers and the window the only thing I find weird is turning or maybe I just suck at driving idk it would be pretty cool to have a radio or something in the car

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your comment :)

reviews.review_description:
Gameplay and review video here (remove the space before 'be' in the URL):

https://youtu. be/STIik55KxuU?si=OPRD_kb4PeLAgGhF

I love it when a game like this comes along and just takes you by surprise! The concept is simple - you're a cab driver and need to pick up and drop off passengers - but the mechanics are implemented so well and driving the car is so much fun, and there are cool details like movable car windows and working rearview mirrors!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your comment and video :) It was a very enjoyable video, well done! We're also very happy that you liked it :)

reviews.review_description: Welcome to the world of VR Taxi! Experience the thrill of being a taxi driver as you navigate through the city, picking up and dropping off customers at their destinations on time. With realistic tasks like opening and closing windows, adjusting the air conditioning, and using your signals and horn, you'll feel like you're really behind the wheel. Don't forget to check your rearview mirror and use your gears wisely to navigate the streets smoothly. VR Taxi offers a truly immersive and challenging gameplay experience for all VR enthusiasts!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your comment :)

reviews.review_title: Super fun...one of my favorite games.
reviews.review_description: One of my favorite games on the meta Quest. I've been waiting on a game like this for quite a while. It's similar to City Car Driving but with a taxi cab. Driving mechanics are very good. Very immersive game I highly recommend it to anyone who loves driving simulations.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, your comment made us very happy :)

reviews.review_description: I played this a little bit and every passenger I picked up resulted in a fail. I'll give it another go later but was wondering if there was something I was missing. I was doing my best to follow traffic laws

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback. You don't always have to follow the rules :) Sometimes it's okay to bend some rules based on time planning :)
